metadata.title:
WHAT RALST0N
OVERLOOKED

HIS 10 CENT ELECTRICITY
IDEA LOOKS SIckLY BE.
SIDE THE RATES CHARGED
IN LOS ANGELES.

pages.raw_text:
In his report on the city light
plant question City Engineer Raj
ston argued that Spokane would
be especially favored If the w. w.
P. Co. could be induced to reduce
its price to the private consumer
from 10 cents per kilowatt hour
to 10 cents.


Down in Los Angeles the three
big light companies there have
been called on the carpet by the
council to explain why they should
charge Los Angeles consumers
nine cents per kilowatt hour when
they are furnishing smaller towns
with current at the rate of six
cents.


One of these companies brings
current from steam generating
plant 35 miles away. Another has
a water power plant 100 miles
from Los Angeles.


Yet with water power station
in the center of Spokane a charge
of 10 cents per kilowatt hour is
tolerated and the city engineer
would consider all necessity OF
competition eliminated could the
w. w. P. Co., favored in location
and economical facilities beyond
all other cities in the west. be in
duced to cut the price to 10 cents


When asked why his company
the Edison, could sell electricity
in Redlands at six cents and
charged nine in Los Angeles
